headline: How The Hasbro (HAS) Narrative Is Shifting With Gaming Upside And Toy Category Pressures
summary: Hasbro’s fair value price target sits at US$112.60 in this updated framework, with no change to the central valuation anchor despite small tweaks to other model inputs. That stability lines up with a mixed analyst backdrop, where optimism around earnings power, gaming potential, and entertainment content is balanced by concerns about toy category share, supply disruption, and cost pressures. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what to watch as the Hasbro story...
